# terrible_cisco_meraki_meraki_ms_switchport (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `serial` (String) Serial nubmer of the switch.

### Optional

- `access_policy_number` (Number) Number of the access policy to apply. Only applicable to access port types.
- `access_policy_type` (String) Type of access policy to apply to port.
- `allowed_vlans` (String) List of VLAN numbers to be allowed on switchport.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether a switchport should be enabled or disabled.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `flexible_stacking_enabled` (Boolean) Whether flexible stacking capabilities are supported on the port.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `isolation_enabled` (Boolean) Isolation status of switchport.
- `link_negotiation` (String) Link speed for the switchport.
- `mac_allow_list` (String) MAC addresses list that are allowed on a port. Only applicable to access port type. Only applicable to access_policy_type "MAC allow list".
- `name` (String) Switchport description.
- `number` (String) Port number.
- `poe_enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable Power Over Ethernet on a port.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `rstp_enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable Rapid Spanning Tree Protocol on a port.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Specifies whether a switchport should be queried or modified.
- `sticky_mac_allow_list` (String) MAC addresses list that are allowed on a port. Only applicable to access port type. Only applicable to access_policy_type "Sticky MAC allow list".
- `sticky_mac_allow_list_limit` (Number) The number of MAC addresses allowed in the sticky port allow list. Only applicable to access port type. Only applicable to access_policy_type "Sticky MAC allow list". The value must be equal to or greater then the list size of sticky_mac_allow_list. Value will be checked for validity, during processing.
- `stp_guard` (String) Set state of STP guard.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) Set port type.
- `vlan` (Number) VLAN number assigned to port. If a port is of type trunk, the specified VLAN is the native VLAN. Setting value to 0 on a trunk will clear the VLAN.
- `voice_vlan` (Number) VLAN number assigned to a port for voice traffic. Only applicable to access port type. Only applicable if voice_vlan_state is set to present.
- `voice_vlan_state` (String) Specifies whether voice vlan configuration should be present or absent.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `data` (String) Information queried or updated switchports.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
